name: Spoken English Assessment
description: AI Spoken Communication Skills & Placement Readiness Assessment evaluating Pronunciation, Fluency, Grammar, Vocabulary, Pace, Confidence, and CEFR level.

questions.text: The internet has changed the way people communicate around the world. It enables instantaneous data exchange and global collaboration.
Artificial Intelligence and machine learning are transforming every modern industry by automating repetitive tasks and boosting efficiency.

questions.audioText: Artificial Intelligence is transforming every industry.
Effective communication is essential for career growth in software engineering.
Continuous learning helps professionals stay competitive in today's fast-paced market.

questions.imageAlt: Modern Corporate Office Workspace Team Meeting
questions.prompt: Describe the scene in this image in detail for 45-60 seconds. Mention the environment, activities, and interactions.
Do you prefer working from home or working in a traditional office environment? Explain your reasons clearly.
Should Artificial Intelligence replace human teachers in schools and universities? Give your opinion with arguments.
Tell me about yourself, your educational background, key technical strengths, and your career aspirations for the next 3 years.
Your project manager gives you an impossible deadline to complete a complex feature by tomorrow morning. How would you professionally respond?
During a team meeting, a colleague strongly disagrees with your code design in front of the client. How do you handle this situation professionally?
